creator: rfarmer@predatorlabs.net
text:
> I don't recall seeing any other reports of problems building this port.
> Can you please provide the actual build failure you're seeing? =A0AFAIK
> FreeBSD 9 uses the same version of gcc as on FreeBSD 8 and these patches
> aren't required there.

I can get you a fresh log from the machine in question tomorrow if you
like, but the jdk ports are failing on pointyhat:

http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-errorlogs/e.9.20100107122952/jd=
k-1.6.0.3p4_13.log
http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-errorlogs/e.9.20100105162846/jd=
